category_title: Elementary student with math learning disabilities who relies on semiconcrete reasoning
scenario_title: Confusion with new word problem contexts
minimal_context: Chris is working on a word problem involving flowers and boxes during a math session.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is the next word problem about flowers and boxes. Please go ahead and solve it.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks at the paper but does not make any attempt to solve the problem)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think you should do first?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I get confused when I say, when I think that [points to flowers and boxes in the problem] is like towers or cubes...

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying to figure it out.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: ...and that is towers when I think it wrong. So, I don’t know what to do when that happens. It take a while to get me to solve it because sometimes I am going to need help.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Here is the next word problem about flowers and boxes. Please go ahead and solve it.

STUDENT: (Looks at the paper but does not make any attempt to solve the problem)

TUTOR: What do you think you should do first?

STUDENT: I get confused when I say, when I think that [points to flowers and boxes in the problem] is like towers or cubes...

TUTOR: Keep trying to figure it out.

STUDENT: ...and that is towers when I think it wrong. So, I don’t know what to do when that happens. It take a while to get me to solve it because sometimes I am going to need help.

task.content: Solving word problems involving flowers and boxes

context.materials: Word problems with real-world contexts (flowers and boxes)
context.social_setting: Exit interview reflection on learning and difficulties

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: when I think that [points to flowers and boxes in the problem] is like towers or cubes and that is towers when I think it wrong
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: It take a while to get me to solve it because sometimes I am going to need help... I don’t know what to do when that happens
related_quotes: It take a while to get me to solve it because sometimes I am going to need help because I get confused when I say, when I think that [points to flowers and boxes in the problem] is like towers or cubes and that is towers when I think it wrong. So, I don’t know what to do when that happens.

behavior_patterns.condition: Prior to the intervention on the AM pretest
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: did not make any attempt on most of the problems
